/usr/bin/ar qc ../lib/libEngine.a CMakeFiles/Engine.dir/Source/Core/Log.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Engine.dir/Source/Core/Assert.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Engine.dir/Source/Core/UUID.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Engine.dir/Source/Core/Timing.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Engine.dir/Source/Diagnostics/Instrumentation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Engine.dir/Source/Diagnostics/BuildInfo.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Engine.dir/Source/Diagnostics/SystemInfo.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Engine.dir/Source/Diagnostics/PerformanceCounters.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Engine.dir/Source/Filesystem/Path.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Engine.dir/Source/Filesystem/File.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Engine.dir/Source/Filesystem/Directory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Engine.dir/Source/Configuration/Config.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Engine.dir/Source/Threading/Thread.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Engine.dir/Source/Threading/CPUInfo.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Engine.dir/Source/Utilities/Hash.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Engine.dir/Source/Utilities/String.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Engine.dir/Source/Utilities/CommandLine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Engine.dir/Source/Core/ModuleRegistry.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib ../lib/libEngine.a
